entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
This is really helpful. I am getting this, but can't see something wrong with the formula: 

A number, currency amount boolean, date, time, date-time, or string is expected here. I checked the format of the expiration date/time, and it seems to be a Crystal accepted format. Sample: 2022-10-01 00:00:00.000

if {Table1.status} = "ACTIVE" then
"Active or Under Renewal Process"
else if {Table1.status} = "RENEWAL PROCESS" then
if DateDiff("d", {Table1.ST_LIC_EXPIRE}, CurrentDate) < 365 then
"Active or Under Renewal Process"
else
"Expired" else "Unknown Status"

entry.title: Re: Not able to create any decision object using SAP Buil...
entry.content: No , still the https://f9add2a0trial.us10.process-automation.build.cloud.sap/comsapspaprocessautomation.comsapsparulemanagedecision/decision.html is still referencing to https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.111.0/resources/sap-ui-core.js which is causing the UI not to load.

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
In your formula on the 3rd to 4th line there's a "then if"...I'm guessing that you want an "and" there. Also at the end you've got 2 different default "else" conditions. I've commented out the last one...let me know how you want the logic to work for the grouping formula.

if {Table1.status} = "ACTIVE"
then "Active or Under Renewal Process"
else if (
     {Table1.status} = "RENEWAL PROCESS" and
     DateDiff("d", {Table1.ST_LIC_EXPIRE}, CurrentDate) < 365
) then "Active or Under Renewal Process"
else "Expired"

// else "Unknown Status"

entry.title: Re: The requests received by the Report Processing Server...
entry.content:
Which version of Crystal Server are you using?  The version of Crystal Report and the version of Crystal Reports Server must match for things to work correctly.

I see that you're using the REST API - the "Crystal Reports" part of this API currently will only work with Crystal for Enterprise reports.  From my experience, I know that the BI Platform REST API will allow you to schedule reports and get instances from the server.  However, I've had better success with using the .NET SDK for scheduling than with using the REST API.  

-Dell

entry.content:
Hey, I am writing to inquire about the timing of the first round scheduled for tomorrow's event. I apologize if this information has already been communicated and I may have missed it. I would greatly appreciate it if someone could kindly confirm the details regarding tomorrow's event, including the time of the first round.

Thank You

I would greatly appreciate it if someone could kindly confirm the details regarding tomorrow's event, including the time of the first round.

Thank You

entry.title: Re: How do I eliminate a page header from appearing on ev...
entry.content:
If you only ever want the page header on the first page of the report, you could put it in the Report Header instead.  If you want the page header on the first page for each group, you would use the Group Header instead and turn on "Repeat Header on Each Page" for the group.  Or if, for example, your report is an invoice and you want to have the header for each client that you are printing an invoice for, you could use the page header and do the following in the Section Expert:

1. In the Suppress formula for the page header, put the following formula: (DO NOT check the Suppress checkbox!)

PageNumber > 1

2.   For the client group footer, turn on "Reset Page Number After".  This will set the page number to 1 every time the client changes, so you'll get the page header on the next page.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: "Not all conditions are fulfilled to generate a packa...

This reply is not an answer.

@SAPSupport Could you take a look at these two BPA structural issues? 

1) Component limiter makes template impossible to release.

2) Decision component windows never fully loading.

Thank you

entry.title: Re: What is difference between material type and material...
entry.content:
Hai,

Material type is "Group of materials with similar attributes"

Material Group is "Materials were classified based on their properties"

Yuching

entry.title: Re: Substitutions in SAP FI
entry.content: @2233667 NS22 or NS23?

entry.title: IBP Excel-add huge performance latency in APAC and EMEA
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We are facing issues with IBP Excel add-in performance when users are using it in EMEA/APAC, our IBP tenant is in the US Azure Datacenter. Wanted to know if any of you using IBP with Excel add-in are using tools like Azure virtual Desktop or Citrix kind of solution to avoid latency issues in EMEA/APAC. 

Appreciate your response as it's affecting our user testing and go-live readiness. Thanks.

entry.title: Re: SAP BI Platform CMS extracts
entry.content:
There are a couple of third-party tools that will pull this information for you.  APOS and Wiisdom (formerly GB&Smith) have tools for this.

It's also not too difficult to get this information using the Java SDK - I wrote a program that does this for all sorts of info from the CMS database and spits the data out as .csv files.  The thing to remember when querying the CMS database through the SDK is that, by default, queries will only return 1000 records.  If you don't have that many reports and instances, then that's not something to worry about.  If you do, then you'll need to either set a high limit on the number of rows using "Top N" syntax in the query or you'll need to write code to "page" the query results.

I can't share most of my code because it is copywritten by my employer.  However, here are some things to think about:

1.  I create separate classes for various things.  This encapsulates the code so that I can re-use it in any program where I need to access BOBJ from code. For example, I have separate classes that:

    A. Handle authentication and logins.  This logs a user in and then instantiates the iEnterpriseSesssion and iInfoStore that are needed for querying.  (See the BOEHelper code attached.)

    B.  Handle CMS queries.  (See the QueryHelper code attached.) This class has a bunch of methods that query for:
          - All properties of an object based on the object's SI_ID value.  The parameters to this method are the SI_ID and the table (CI_INFOOBJECTS, CI_SYSTEMOBJECTS, CI_APPOBJECTS).
          - The ID and name of all objects with a specified SI_PARENTID.
          - Run a specified query for a single result set.
          - Run a specified query for a paged result set.

    C. A separate class for each object "kind" that I query for.  These all inherit from a base class that gets the security for the object.  Within each of the sub-classes, I cast an iInfoObject from the query results to whatever kind of object it is and get the kind-specific properties for the object.

I've attached the code for logons and working with queries to get you started.

-Dell

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@MKreitlein  I do not have any official facts and figures, but in the Nordics this is a well known movement. Rough numbers 50% of the SAP BW customer I work with have already taken the steps to move away from BW. Of the remaining 50% approx. half of them have it as a long time vision. A big part of these customers are seriously considering SAP Datasphere as a way forward and we have several prototypes of SAP Datasphere solutions for SAP centric reporting starting up and running. 

Out of net new S/4HANA customer only a very small portion have chosen SAP BW/4HANA that last 4 years in the Nordics. Some have chosen SAP Datasphere and a big part have chosen other cloud solutions for SAP centric reporting.

entry.title: BW4HANA Views catalog
entry.content:
Hello,

We have been using BW4HANA last 2 years and accumulated over 600 calculated views (CVs).

One of the challenges to identify the data fields in the views. Is there any API available to read the metadata of the CVs to identify the data fields? Currently it is very challenging to identify the fields unless you use studio or some kind of reporting tools. 

Any advise related to this topic is much appreciated .

Thank you !

entry.title: Re: Fiori Launchpad - Notification Configuration

entry.title: Re: Sales Cloud Version 2 odata for create Case type - Notes error
entry.content: Did you figure out how to resolve this issue?

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@kenneth_dalvik  Doesn't your comment here contradict the title of this post?

" The idea is not a big bang and replace BW 7.5 over short period of time. I acknowledge that there are still gaps. And I hope that they are closed sooner rather than later. The suggestion is to have BW 7.5 and Datasphere side by side until the support of BW7.5 comes to an end in Dec 2027. That gives 3,5 years and approx 14 releases to close the necessary gaps that still exists. "

Sounds like you're saying Datasphere is not yet ready to completely replace BW for existing customers. I'd suggest changing the title as it might be a bit misleading. 

Like @MKreitlein I'd be interested in any figures you have, beyond anecdotal evidence, regarding SAP's BW customer base (> 17,000 BW customers last I heard) i.e. how many lost BW customers year over year. What type of steps are you referring to here, '50% of the SAP BW customers I work with have already taken the steps to move away from BW.'? 

Regards,

Ed

entry.title: Re: The new SAP Digital Manufacturing for Insights, including MDOs, Operational Reports and Embedded
entry.content:
@ManoelCosta 

Excellent videos for understanding what eSAC offers. 

Is it possible to publish one video on OEE KPIs, which will be an eye-opener for many newcomers?

entry.title: Re: Deep-dive into SAP EWM Consolidation Groups during Packing
entry.content:
hi experts,

In the customer's scenario, we have Wave picking and will have 10 packaging tables.
I am using a 1:1 relationship between the consolidation groups and the ODOs, so that picking does not have a mix of ODOs in the same HU.
How can I allocate all ODOs from the same wave to a packaging table, without mixing more than one Wave on the table

I don't know if this is the best topic to talk about, but I really appreciate any ideas on what I should configure to make this scenario work.

Best Regards

Thanks!

entry.title: Start Hour of Sale at # instead of 1
entry.content:
Hello! New to using SAP BusinessObjects Web Intelligence for my business, so I apologize in advance if this is rudimentary question.

We are using the Hour of Sale characteristic in our ecomm reporting. However, the column starts with hour 1, which is 1am to 2am which is not actually the first hour of the day. The # hour is 12am to 1am, but it is the last column.

Is there a way to have the Hour of Sale start with #, then 1, 2 and so on? Instead of starting with 1?

SAP BusinessObjects - Web Intelligence (WebI)

entry.title: what are different strategies to handle old files (> 2 year) in SAP BTP Document Management service?
entry.content:
Storage on SAP BTP Document Management service, repository option is very expensive. so, I would like to understand different strategies to handle old files (> 2 year) in SAP BTP Document Management service.

can we add a low cost external repositories (Azure blob, S3bucket, sharepoint, etc..) to offload files?

9078d97aa244c244fc63fd87937e0c06192ced0ca03ea85eb8773484dc84037e

@Dan_Wroblewski Now that was a, "Challenge".

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@edwin_ryan2  If a BW 7.5 customer can replace BW with Datasphere depends on complexity if the solutions. Low to medium complex solutions can be re-built using Datasphere objects already now. 

There are quite a substantial number of customer that does not have a SAP BW and used SAP Datasphere to build SAP centric reporting solutions.  I have personally worked with three customers in the Nordics that have built reporting solution on Datasphere. 

The title says SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW. That means to be the platform to build SAP centric reporting solution on sources like S/4HANA, Successfactors, EWM. TM.. 

It does not say to take over each and every feature for each and every solution in an existing BW7.5 solutions. That is why I am suggestion to build new requirements on SAP Datasphere and move the solutions that can be moved to start with. 

The message and the essence is for BW 7.5 customers to avoid a costly BW/4HANA upgrade and instead start manual greenfield approach with Datasphere. From total TCO perspective I am certain that is the wise thing to do.

entry.title: How to reverse or delete customer line items?
entry.content:
Hello. Last week my college taught me about SAP. And I have a practice at http://zelda.ucc.uwm.edu/fiori?sap-client=103&sap-language=EN 
So I have many questions to ask you, Sorry for that, but you know my teacher is hard to contact. And sometimes when I asked her she didn't answer me back.

I wrote all customer IDs wrong. Then I tried to reverse and reset all the invoices, but it didn't work. The debit part increases the value of the invoices. (I have a sample picture.)


As you can see from the picture above. 126,000 is an incorrect number. It has to be 34,000 (But after I reversed and reset customer invoices, the number was increased to 126,000)

And when I clicked on Debit(126,000). I got this...

Many invoices that I didn't even know where they came from. (I knew that I had done 7 wrong invoices, but not these many invoices as the above picture)  

*This is my example problem.*


At this point. you probably saw that I made a mistake. But I would like to reverse and delete an invoice. Could you help me Please? Thank you later.

entry.title: Workflow error with non existing Node/Work item in wf
entry.content:
Dear All,

I am getting below error message from workflow.

Kindly help.

Background: I deleted a standard Mail send step (TS94000113) from workflow and below message started. I haven't got any solution on the forum through similar sounding queries in past.The Mail send step (TS94000113) doesn't exists in workflow though wf behaves as if still exists. SWU_OBUF didn't worked. SWU3 has been generated.

Regards.

entry.title: Compensation tool Field filter for Promote event not working
entry.content:
In the compensation tool, there is a Field Filter which can filter records based on the criteria.

when we apply a filter with Promotion Status = Yes, is should only show records with green sign next to employee name where promote event is done but in our case it is giving out records even where promote event is not done with only some Promote event done green symbol.

for example, we have overall 150 records with promote event done for the employees - which means records with green symbol (Promotion entered) but when we apply this field filter, we see around 80-90 such records and another 20-30 records where there is no green symbol (No Promotion entered)

My and the HR role RBP is all set as we can see all employees in the scope, it is only when the filter with this field type called Promotion Status = Yes, we dont see the correct set of employee records. 

Need help if someone has come across this issue.

entry.title: Re: SAP Datasphere is ready to take over the role of SAP BW
entry.content:
@MKreitlein @kenneth_dalvik Thanks for responses on planning in Datasphere.

Seamless planning integration with SAP Datasphere in Q3 2024 of the Roadmap seems to be a great enhancement. SAP Analytics Cloud should be really just a frontend if you have SAP Datasphere too in your environment! 

  • Deploy new models in SAP Analytics Cloud to SAP Datasphere spaces, with the model data (facts and master data) residing in SAP Datasphere
  • Expose facts and public dimensions (except account dimensions) in the data builder of SAP Datasphere for analytic modeling

Regards,
Tuncay

entry.title: Re: API_SUPPLIERINVOICE_PROCESS_SRV is unable to park Ser...
entry.content:
Hello, 

How was this issue resolved?

entry.title: Re: Timely Time Sheet Alerts for no records on previous working day
entry.content:
For those of you that have successfully set up Part 2, can you share how you are populating the 'has_time_records' field? We currently have it hard coded to populate the field as 'Yes' to indicate that a notification should be generated. However, with that setting, once the time sheets are submitted and approved, then I don't see how the record will ever change to 'No'.

Since we are using the Filters in the IC report to determine if there are pending entries, then it seems that when there are no more Pending Time Sheets, then the employee would not even be included in the report to change back to 'No'. A colleague is suggesting that we have to have a 2nd report with opposite filters that sets the field back to 'No'.

Even with that solution, if an employee is included in a report and gets the notification but still does not submit/approve, it appears that the record is not being updated again, so will the notification go out again on the next run?

Thanks in advance for any feedback. This sounds like a good solution, but we have been struggling with the execution of the steps that are not really covered.

Cindy

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding Tomorrow's MCQ Test
entry.content: Has the quiz link is been distributed?

entry.title: Binance Referans Kodu: TAYXRS3K
entry.content:
2024 yılı Binance referans kodu TAYXRS3K olarak belirlenmiştir. Bu referans kodu ile yeni üyelik oluşturulduğunda ömür boyu %20 komisyon indirimi ve 600$ hoşgeldin ödülü kazanabilirsiniz.

Binance, yeni üye olan kullanıcılara referans kimliği tanımlama imkanı vermiştir. Bu özel kodu kullanan kullanıcılar yapacağı her işlemde ödenmesi gereken komisyon tutarından %20 oranında tasarruf edebilir. Kodu boş bırakarak üyeliğini tamamlayanlar ise bu fırsattan yararlanamaz ve komisyon tutarının tamamını her defasında öder.

Sadece komisyon indirimi değil, 600 dolara varan ödül de alınabilir. Üye olduktan sonra ödül merkezine gidilip oldukça basit olan görevler tamamlanırsa anında 600$ ödül kazanabilirsiniz. Bunların tamamını yapabilmek için TAYXRS3K kodunu referans kimliği kısmına tanımlamalısınız.

Binance yeni üye olan kullanıcılara en fazla %20 komisyon indirimi sağlamaktadır. TAYXRS3K kodu ile en yüksek indirimi kazanabilirsiniz.

entry.title: Re: Send Keys on Windows / SAP / saving pdf file
entry.content: Hello @stefan_schnell, I tried this combination as well. It wont generate the error, but doesn`t save the file. I think the code till this line works fine, because the window seems to be active, but the biggest obstacle is to move it further with any action. I also tried with sendkeys b and tab, to watch if it opens/changes but it didn`t. So I think something is wrong with sendkeys method

entry.title: Setup of Synthetic User Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content:
Introduction

SAP Cloud ALM Synthetic User Monitoring allows you to monitor any web-ui based application throughout your entire landscape. It simulates the inputs and clicks from an enduser perspective and as such, Synthetic User Monitoring is the spiritual successor of the Enduser Experience Monitoring in SAP Solution Manager.
In this article I'm going to show you step-by-step instructions on how to setup Synthetic User Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM with a third party Selenium WebDriver provider.

Architecture Overview

In Synthetic User Monitoring you need a so called "Runner" which, in simple terms, is a robot that executes your prepared selenium scripts.
These runners are based on the Selenium WebDriver infrastructure.
So you will need such a web driver infrastructure and for that you have two options:
1. A local on-premise Selenium WebDriver
2. A cloud based 3rd party WebDriver provider.
In this guide we will focus on the cloud based 3rd party provider, depicted in this picture upper half.
The application to be monitored is shown as an SAP BTP application, but it could really be any web application.

 

Getting a Provider Subscription

SAP Cloud ALM supports a wide variety of Selenium WebDriver providers.
Personally I have successfully tested three of them: BrowserStack, LambdaTest and SauceLabs.
But I suppose any of the providers listed on the Selenium Website will do.
https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/drivers/remote_webdriver/ 
For the sake of fairness, I will not give any recommendation for a specific provider.
I suggest that you do your own evaluation for any of the available providers and their subscription models.
As a starting point you can just signup for a trial account on any provider and then take it from there.

 

Prerequisites

Once you have your account with the provider of your choice you need the following things:

  • Your account information (this is not your normal username/password with your provider!)
  • The URL of your Selenium WebDriver
  • A Selenium Script: See my blog on creating scripts with Selenium IDE: HERE 

Gathering your account information

For LambdaTest

Log in to your account, then in the upper right corner click on "Dashboard"

Then in the upper right corner click on your account details, then on "Account Settings"


From your account settings click on "Password & Security". Here you can copy your user name and access key (this is not your password).

For SauceLabs

Log in to your account, then from the upper right menu click on the key icon.
Here, again you can copy your user name and access key.

For Browserstack

Log in to your account then from the upper right menu click on the account icon and choose "Account & Profile"


Then from the lefthand menu choose "My Profile"


Here, again you can copy your username and access key.

WebDriver URLs

Depending on your chosen provider you need one of the following URLs:

  • LambdaTest: https://hub.lambdatest.com/wd/hub 
  • SauceLabs: https://ondemand.eu-central-1.saucelabs.com/wd/hub 
  • BrowserStack: https://hub-cloud.browserstack.com/wd/hub

 

Setup in SAP Cloud ALM

For the setup of Synthetic User Monitoring in SAP Cloud ALM you are going to create the following components:

  • Runners: These are the "robots" that will execute your scripts
  • Resources: These are the Selenium scripts that you created using Selenium IDE
  • Scenarios: These are the "containers" that glue everyhing together, schedule the execustions and show you the results.

Creating Runners

From the Operations section of SAP Cloud ALM choose the tile "Synthetic User Monitoring".

If this is the first time you access this tile, then you get greeted by a welcome screen.
Click on "configuration"


When you open the configuration for the first time everything is empty, so you need to add your first runner.
In the left menu click on "Runners" and choose "Add" from the upper right area.



From the following dialog enter a name for your runner as well as the data gathered from the Prerequisites section of this blog (URLs and user / access token). Make sure you set the type to "Internet" for cloud based Selenium WebDrivers.


If the registration is successful the result should look like this:

 

From this view in the "Endpoint" tab you can also adjust further settings or perform a connection test.
 

Creating Resources

In this step you upload the Selenium scripts that you previously created using the Selenium IDE.
In the lefthand menu click on "Resources", then in the upper right area click on "Upload".


Browse for the Selenium script that you prevsiously created as described in my previous blog.
Create Selenium scripts for SAP Cloud ALM Synthetic User Monitoring
Then click on "Upload"

Creating Scenarios

So far we have runners and resources, we now have to create a scenario holding the two together.
In the lefthand menu click on "Scenarios", then in the upper right area click "Add"

In the "General" section give your scenario a name and a description.
Then fom the "Execution" section chose the script to be executed (you uploaded this in the previous chapter)
Finally choose which business services the scenario should be included in.
There's one created by default, but you can also include the scenario in your own business services.


After the creation, you have to assign a runner to the scenario.
On the lefthand menu choose "Scenarios", then click on the scenario you just created.

From the "General" section click on "Assign" to assign a runner.


Now choose the runner that you previously created:

Finally from the list of runners, make sure the runner is active for this scenario, then save and close:

 

Business Service Assignment

In order to see results, make sure your scenario is assigned to at least  one business service.
(in my case the assignmend of the previous chapter didn't persist, so I had to do it again here.)
From the lefthand menu choose "Business Services", then cklick on the desired business service you want the scenario to be included. Again this can be the default one (created automatically) or one that you created yourself.

From the "General" section click on the "Assign" button.

Choose the scenario you want to be assigned, it will get added to the list above, then click on the "Assign" button.


The result should look something like this. Notice the Scenario has been added to the list.
You can go ahead and click on the "Close" button.

If you have done everything correctly the final result should look something like this:
Note that in the lower scenario picture I assigned several runners from different providers and also an on-prem runner which will be part of another blog.



 


Conclusion

We have learned how to register runners from different providers. We have uploaded Selenium scripts that we previously created. Finally we have put everything together in a scenario and assigned that to a business service.

entry.title: Unable to log in to SAP BusinessObjects CMC
entry.content:
We were recently performing regular maintenance, including an OS patching of the SAP BO development server for one of the SoftwareONE customers.

During the patching, some issues were encountered leading to a failure. It was decided to restore the operationability of the application by reverting to the previously backed-up state of the VM back to the patching event, and the Basis team was tasked to bring the application up and do the sanity tests.

The application was able to start but the login to the CMC was denied.

Environment:

OS: SLES 15 SP 3

 

Application: BI 4.2 SP8 P6

 

Issue:

 

Enterprise login with Administrator account was not happening.

The logs suggested that the Server Intelligence Agent (SIA) responsible for running the service is getting stooped.

 

 

SIDBOBJ.CrystalReports2016ReportApplicationServer has been started.

|32B2388B56794CAEB56BA8F9F43F74F01f|2024 01 09 14:24:22.951|+0100|Information| |==| | |SIA_SIDBOBJ| 8444|  84|PFDBOBJ.CrystalReports2016ReportApplicationServer (Native Process Agent)| ||||||||||||||||||||com.businessobjects.cad.syslog||Server Intelligence Agent: server SIDBOBJ.CrystalReports2016ReportApplicationServer stopped with exit code = 127 (0x7f).

|32B2388B56794CAEB56BA8F9F43F74F020|2024 01 09 14:24:22.953|+0100|Error| |==|E| |SIA_SIDBOBJ| 8444|  83|PFDBOBJ.CrystalReports2016ReportApplicationServer (Process Agent)| ||||||||||||||||||||com.businessobjects.cad.syslog||Server Intelligence Agent: server SIDBOBJ.CrystalReports2016ReportApplicationServer is considered failed because it has stopped 5 time(s) within 60 minute(s). Please restart this server.

Multiple application restarts and OS reboots were taken but all the efforts were in vain as the login to the CMC was still not enabled.

 

Investigation:

The error code is a generic one and normally it occurs when the connectivity to the CMS DB is broken and the application is unable to fetch the data from the dbo repository of CMS Database to enable authentication.

First point of investigation is to check the connectivity to the CMS DB via the ODBC connector string (for Linux). It may happen that the user responsible for this connection is either expired or  locked because of any other activity.

In this case, we were able to connect to the underlying HANA database using the connection string but still the login was not enabled to the central management console via the CMC url.

Digging further into this issue we observed that the process boe_cmsd was getting terminated after the application was started. This is a mandatory process which is critical to the normal functioning of the CMS. The logs at this point didn’t helped much either.

This led us to the conclusion that the boe_cmsd was corrupted.

Resolution:

In such cases where the boe_cmsd gets corrupted it is recommended by SAP to copy this from any working environment.

Path of the executable: <installdirectory>/enterprise_xi40/linux_x64/boe_cmsd

In this case it was - /usr/sap/DBO/sap_bobj/enterprise_xi40/linux_x64

 

We copied this from the test environment of this landscape which was working as expected. Post copy when the application was restarted this process appeared to be stable and we were able to login to the CMC using the enterprise Administrator account credentials.

Conclusion: In cases where authentication is not an issue and the SAP BusinessObjects application still doesn't allow login to the CMC then it is important to check the boe_cmsd process running on the Linux server. This service is critical and responsible for allowing login to the central management console.

entry.title: ETL Business Analytics with SAP Signavio
entry.content:
Collaboration Hub

This is the spot where one can integrate and make an Umbrella level process depicting the whole business from Upstream to Downstream. That has embedded various Business Processes within covering different Business departments. Here, in the main cover, you can see the look and feel of Collaboration Hub - that's the landing page that appears when customer logs in to the Signavio portal. From this spot, teammates can collaborate various stuffs.

 

Process Manager

Using this component, one can model Business process diagrams with BPMN 2.0 practice, even can import diagrams in .xml format which are handy. Also, one can simulate Business processes and then improvements can be carried out. 

 

Process Intelligence

Using this component, one can create Business KPI Dashboards, with tiles along with filters available to refine the KPI information on tiles. For this, pre-requisite is to have the Quality Data in extracted format to be fed. This data can be fed in 3 ways :

  • One time upload of files
  • Direct connection to ERP systems or Database systems
  • Direct connection scheduled

 

Customer Journey Modeler

Here one can model the personas, may it be challenges or fine running processes. This is a reference material for employees to understand the state-of-the-art of ongoing business. Once new Blue Print documents are prepared, this would be revised.

 

Hope, this helps Readers & our Global community.

entry.title: Dynamic Derivations using BADI in SAP MDG
entry.content:
Business rules are one of the important feature in Master Data Governance Process. Deriving the value for particular field of an entity can be done either by BRF Plus or BADI. This Blog Post explains you about creating complex or dynamic derivation rules which can be achieved through BADI.

         In this post , I am taking the example of deriving Cost Centre value from Cost Centre Entity of Finance     Data Model . Its a kind of Mandatory and derivation rule and the naming convention should be followed.

RULE :

          First two characters are defined using the backend table which is the custom table provided by the business based on 'Company Code' and 'Business Area' fields in Cost Center entity . The rest of the characters are auto populated based on the next number available for the range.

Ex: If Cost Centre number available in the system for LM range is LM0025. So , when requestor is creating the new cost center the CC value should be auto populated to LM0026 .

IMPLEMENTATION :  

           1. Implement your custom logic in 'IF_EX_USMD_RULE_SERVICE2~DERIVE' method and trigger the code.

         Perform the below steps for execution : Go to MDGIMG ( t-code ) -> General settings -> Data Quality and Search ->BADI -> Define Validations and Derivations ( execute ). Create enhancement.

 

                                  Enhancement Spot  :   'ZENH_MDG_FI_CCTR'.

                                  BADI Name                :   'ZBI_MDG_FI_CCTR'.

                                  Method Name           :   'IF_EX_USMD_RULE_SERVICE~DERIVE_ENTITY'.  

                                  Filter Values               :   'Entity Type' and 'Data Model'.

Logic for Derivation Rule :

PARAMETERS :  

 

method IF_EX_USMD_RULE_SERVICE~DERIVE_ENTITY.
                   
TYPES : BEGIN OF ty_cctr,
              zcctr TYPE cctr,
            END OF ty_cctr.

    DATA : lr_request      TYPE REF TO if_usmd_crequest_api,
           lv_cr_number    TYPE usmd_crequest,
           lv_crequest     TYPE usmd_s_crequest,
           it_crequest     TYPE STANDARD TABLE OF usmd_s_crequest,
           usmd_creq_type  TYPE usmd_creq_type,
           usmd_created_by TYPE xubanme.

    DATA : lv_physical_name TYPE mdg_gn_physical_name,
           lv_busarea       TYPE gser,
           lv-ccode         TYPE bukrs,
           lc_cctr          TYPE name-komp VALUE 'CCTR',
           lv_range         TYPE kostl,
           lv_cctr          TYPE kostl,
           lv_ccblash       TYPE zde-ccblash,

           result           TYPE string,
           count            TYPE i,
           cnt              TYPE i VALUE 0,
           lv_alp           TYPE string,
           lv_num           TYPE string,
           lv_ccrange       TYPE n LENGTH 4,
           lv_len           TYPE i,
           lv_bsrange       TYPE n LENGTH 10,

           it_cctr          TYPE TABLE OF ty_cctr,
           lv_op            TYPE string VALUE '%',
           lv_sctr          TYPE kost1,
           lv_number        TYPE string.

    CONSTANTS : lc_logical_cctr TYPE mdg_gn_logical_name VALUE 'TCK_0G_CCTR'.

*Getting WF step.
    TRY.
        DATA(lo_context) = cl_usmd_app_context=>get_context().
      CATCH cx_usmd_app_context_cons_error INTO DATA(lo_exception).
    ENDTRY.

    IF lo_cotext IS BOUND.
      lo_context->get_attributes( IMPORTING ev_crequest_type = DATA(lv_range)
                                            ev_crequest_step = DATA(lv_wf_step) ).
    ENDIF.

*Deriving Cost Centre Value.
    SELECT SINGLE cskio_range FROM t9k_csk_io_range
          INTO _range WHERE gsber = _busarea AND bukrs = _ccode.

    IF sy-subrc = 0.
      CONCATENATE lv_range lv_op INTO lv_str.

      SELECT SINGLE physical_name FROM mdg_gn_tgobj
               INTO lv_physical_name WHERE logical_name EQ lc_logical_name
                     AND new_version = ''.

      IF sy-subrc = 0.
        SELECT /1md/0gcctr FROM (lv_physical_name) INTO TABLE it_cctr
                 WHERE /1md/0gcctr LIKE lv_sctr.
        IF sy-subrc = 0.
          SORT it_cctr STABLE BY zcctr DESCENDING.
          READ TABLE it_cctr INTO DATA(wa_cctr) INDEX 1.

*Formating the Cost Center Value.

          count = strlen(wa_cctr).
          DO count TIMES.
            result = wa_cctr + cnt(1).

            IF result CA 'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'.
              CONCATENATE lv_alp result INTO lv_alp.
              CLEAR result.
            ELSE.
              CONCATENATE lv-num result INTO lv_num.
              CLEAR result.
            ENDIF.
            cnt = cnt+1.
          ENDDO.
          lv_num = lv_num + 1.
          CLEAR lv_cctr.
          CONCATENATE lv_alp lv_num INTO lv_cctr.

          lv_len = strlen(lv_cctr).
          IF lv_len < 6.
            lv_ccrange = lv_num.
            CLEAR lv_cctr.

            CONCATENATE lv_alp lv_ccrange INTO lv_cctr.
          ENDIF.

        ELSE.
          CONCATENATE lv_range '0000'INTO lv_range.
          CLEAR lv-cctr.
          lv_cctr = lv_range.
          SHIFT lv_range RIGHT DELETING TRAILING space.
          OVERLAY lv_range WITH '0000'.
          lv_cctr = lv_range.
        ENDIF.
      ENDIF.
    ELSE.
      lv_num = lv_number+7(3).
      CONCATENATE 'TMP' lv_num INTO lv_sctr.
      lv_cctr = lv_sctr.
      gv_sctr = lv_sctr.
    ENDIF.
    CONCATENATE 'TMP_001'  ' ' INTO lv_cctr.
  ENDIF.
ENDIF.
endmethod.

 

CHECKING THE VALUE ON NWBC SCREEN:

                             Fig 1 : NWBC Screen

CONCLUSION :

                         We can accomplish the Complex Business Requirement by dynamically coding it in the BADI.

           These kind of rules can't be attained through BRF+ which involves some custom tables , joining those tables   getting the data, seggregating the data and formatting the data.  Likewise , we can perform validations by using check entity method in Validations and Derivations BADI.

          Your Ideas and feedback about my blog are highly important . Please feel free to post your comments under comment section in my blog.

                     Also do check out for the other posts which are related to MDG .

https://blogs.sap.com/2016/09/13/mdg-80-in-real-life-blog-series-how-to-configure-and-customize-rule-based-workflow/

https://blogs.sap.com/2013/08/20/cross-entity-derivations-using-badi-usmdruleservicecrosset/

https://blogs.sap.com/2012/10/02/mdg-configuration-of-the-screens-based-on-user-role/

https://blogs.sap.com/2021/04/21/use-custom-filter-object-drff-in-the-s-4-hana-bp-outbound-replication/

Thanks!

entry.title: Re: Third-party subcontracting process overview in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content:
Hi Michaelquesnot 
This is an excellent blog and very easy to follow. THanks for Screenshots as well. we have exactly the same scenario with VC item and everything worked except Subcontracting consumption where we have a nuance of sales order stock.
We have one issue though where component is sales order stock internally manufactured and sent to Subcontractor as 543 "E" . This is statistical GR and not 101 "E"  like other account assignment with consumption indicator  "E" at account assignment category. 
All this is good. However the component which is supposed to inherit parent attributes and to be sent to subcontractor in Sales order stock cannot be issued against this PO .
I get error update control movement type is incorrect for 543 X X E _ _ V.
Is 543 "E" not supported for this scenario and only possible to do 543 "O" (Which works though).

Even if you havent seen this scenario, thanks again for the blog.

entry.title: Modal window in SAP - how to retrieve the correct position?
entry.content:
Hello!

I try to manage modal window in SAP:

I noticed that in the code the indexes are very different, moreover they depend also on number of hits

 

session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/sub/1[0,0]/sub/1/2[0,0]/lbl[37,1]").setFocus

session.findById("wnd[1]/usr/sub/1[0,0]/sub/1/3[0,1]/lbl[1,2]").setFocus

 

Can someone explain what is what in these codes? (Both are from almost the same modal window, the one from the case with one record found, and the second from the case above, with two records found)modal

entry.title: Re: SAP CPI - UDF Mapping Context Issue
entry.content:
You have to convert the second parameter, so that it has the same number of context changes as the first one. Then the UDF will be called with both parameters as arrays. Each call will get matching contexts for each parameter one set at a time. Then you can loop on the second parameter and make copies of the first parameter.  You won't get a cross product of the arguments. 

You can change the second parameter to a list either by changing the context, by going one level up or using the function removeContext. 

Here is for illustration a function that copies a value several times as specified by the second parameter. Your requirement is different. 

def void copyManyTimes(String[] value, String[] count, Output output, MappingContext context) {
    
    count.eachWithIndex { it,i ->
        (it as Integer).times { output.addValue( value[i] ) }
        output.addContextChange()
    }
    
}​

entry.title: How to retrieve value from modal window?
entry.content:
Hi!

Another problem with modal window, this time such one:

I can retrieve the value total available stock with text function, but I am not able to retrieve the values from the grey fields. I tried with property 

  • ShowMessageBox

but it doesn`t work. Also the tracker does not register these fields. Has someone any idea?

entry.title: Re: CDS View with Structure and Hierarchy Node Filter
entry.content: Has there been an update / solution regarding the handling of hierarchy node filters in CDS views?

entry.title: Re: How to retrieve value from modal window?
entry.content:
Grabbing info from a modal window depends on how it's built:

Fancy Frameworks 

  1. Find the element with the pro value you want (text box, dropdown, etc.) inside the modal.
  2. Use a bit of magic Javascript (don't worry  it's simple) to grab the value when a button is clicked. Imagine it like a tiny hand reaching in and snagging the info.

Plain Javascript

  1. Similar to above, find the element with the value.
  2. Use a different kind of Javascript trick (also simple) to grab the value when a button is clicked. Same idea, tiny Javascript hand snags the info.

 Knowing what kind of modal you have (fancy framework or plain Javascript). If you tell me more about that, I can give you the exact Javascript hand trick to use!

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content:
That makes sense. With the updated snippet I get: A number, currency amount, boolean, date, time, date-time, or string is expected here.

Then it shows this:

if IsNull ({@Filter})
then 0
else if {@Filter} = "Active or Under Renewal Process" or

then -3
else if {@Filter} = "Expired"
then -2
else 0

entry.title: Re: What You Need to Know About Blogging Post-Migration
entry.content:
Hi, @javier_rp1:

We address that topic in this post: https://community.sap.com/t5/what-s-new/addressing-common-questions-and-complaints-about-the-new-platform/ba-p/13598606 (section: Feeds by publication date (not just recent activity)). For now, we have created videos that might help you use search to find recently published blog posts: https://pages.community.sap.com/resources/how-to-videos.

Kind regards,

--Jerry

entry.title: Re: HANA Change Management Strategies/Comparisons/Use cases
entry.content:
Hello Experts!
Could anyone guide me if SAP HANA Database changes are implemented/ migrated/ imported using Change and Transport System (CTS), will these changes appear under E070 table?

entry.title: Re: SLP_CTS: Error during deployment initialization: Not...
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I understand this is very old post. However, if someone is looking for answer, here it is.

I too faced this issue and found that you need to ensure your subaccount should not hold any white space (or) if it has white spaces, you need to add a filler while configuring destination. PFB example. 

For ex : If you have your sub account name as "SAP Subaccount QA", you may end up with this issue. So, I created my QA subaccount as "SAPsubaccountQA" and configured my destination. This worked. 

However, if your subaccount has spaces - then ensure you have added "%20" for space as filler. For ex: If you have subaccount name as "SAP Subaccount QA", then while configuring your destination, configure it as "SAP%20Subaccount%20QA". The overall config URL should look like this - "
https://deploy-service.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/slprot/SAP%20Subaccount%20QA/qa/slp "

PFB SAP Documentation link of this. 
https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management/sap-cloud-transport-management/creating-destinations-using-sap-cloud-deployment-service-with-basic-authentication?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Deprecation of Classic Reporting
entry.content: Is there somewhere we can get a screenshot of where the Archive & Print function will be in the future?

entry.title: Re: Fatal error during deployment of CPI transport reques...
entry.content:
Hello Folks,

I understand this is very old post. However, if someone is looking for answer, here it is.

I too faced this issue and found that you need to ensure your subaccount should not hold any white space (or) if it has white spaces, you need to add a filler while configuring destination. PFB example. 

For ex : If you have your sub account name as "SAP Subaccount QA", you may end up with this issue. So, I created my QA subaccount as "SAPsubaccountQA" and configured my destination. This worked. 

However, if your subaccount has spaces - then ensure you have added "%20" for space as filler. For ex: If you have subaccount name as "SAP Subaccount QA", then while configuring your destination, configure it as "SAP%20Subaccount%20QA". The overall config URL should look like this - "
https://deploy-service.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/slprot/SAP%20Subaccount%20QA/qa/slp "

PFB SAP Documentation link of this. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-transport-management/sap-cloud-transport-management/creating-destinations-using-sap-cloud-deployment-service-with-basic-authentication?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: Controlling the Visibility of SAP Enable Now and SAP Companion Content
entry.content:
Hi Karen,

There are two options to do this:

1. User Role details can be passed through the Single Sign On (SSO) process so users automatically have the relevant User and therefore Business Role when the user accesses Enable Now.  The corporategroups attribute is used for this purpose.  You can learn more about this through this KBA, please discuss this option with the person who sets up SSO in your organization, to see if this is an option

2. User details can be loaded and updated through a spreadsheet load.  The easiest way to manage this process is:
 - Open Manager
- Select Administration > Users
- Click the Export button and export the user details
- Update the Position value for each user to define the User/Business Roles relevant for that user; roles are separated by commas.  In the image below, the corresponding user will have two User/Business Roles, Reviewers and Learners
- In Manager, select Administration > User Import and import the modified user details

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Purchase document is allocated to asset in SAP Public...
entry.content:
Hi @imel_99 

I could find no SSCUI / Configuration activity in S/4HANA Cloud to change the error to a warning like mentioned in the thread.

 

For S/4HANA Cloud there is a KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3154459 about this error 

The Best Practice is to use an Investment Project to post the costs and then settle the project to an assets (See Best Practice Guides Project Control - Finance (‏1NT‏) and Period-End Closing - Maintenance Orders (‏BF7‏)).

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.content: I see it but I didn't write that. That is what Crystal presented to me. This tells me something in the original formula is not acceptable by Crystal is my guess.

entry.title: EWM Putaway Storage Section Indicator Defaulting to Incorrect Putaway Bin
entry.content: Product does not have a Fixed Bin assigned and the Putaway Storage Section Indicator is set to HTZN in EWM Product Master Data, then the assumption is the automatic warehouse task Storage Bin for Putaway should go to a Bin with the Storage Section HTZN, it does not.

entry.title: Re: Error in Loading Learning Center
entry.content:
Hi Adeola,

The values of the DATA_URL_WPB2 and LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL are not exactly the same.  The following example shows the difference:

DATA_URL_WPB2 example
https://customerABC.enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/workareaID/

LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL
https://customerABC.enable-now.cloud.sap/

The LEARNING_APP_BACKEND_URL must be combined with the LEARNING_APP_WORKSPACE parameter that would be set to the ID of the Enable Now Workarea containing the learning content; in my example, it would be set to workareaID.

In  my example, you must replace customerABC with your Enable Now system name and workareaID with the actual ID of your Workarea.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Query regarding SAP Inside Track - Hyderabad 2024
entry.content:
We want to do big this time so planning in progress once dates are final will start publishing. 

keep an watch on Hyd community page

entry.title: EWM blind cycle count by bin (not product and/or batch)
entry.content:
We're struggling with a bit of an issue right now with EWM.  We're getting feedback that we need to develop a custom solution for this.  But it just seems very odd to me that there is no way to do this out of the box or via config.  It seems like a very common need - "WMS 101" to me.  Any thoughts?

**Business Scenario**

Bin B01-01-01 has a physical pallet that has 40 batches of material X on it.   A user did a bin-to-bin move for material X,  batch 1234 for the full quantity of 10 to a new bin but never physically moved the stock.   Two days later, material X is cycle counted in bin B01-01-01.    Note: All batches are barcoded and pointing outward for scanning on all four sides of the physical pallet.

During the cycle count by WO, the user is directed to count material X, for a specific batch presented by the system.  The order of batches being presented causes the user to walk around the pallet searching for each batch to be scanned many times.  This is causing inefficiencies with counting a material that is batch managed when multiple batches exist in the bin / on a physical pallet.  

During an audit of this bin, it was found that the user missed counting the extra batch that was on the pallet as this batch 1234 was bin to bin moved in the system only, not physically moved.  According to the system the cycle count document was 100% counted, no differences.    The user explained that they are moving around the pallet so many times they cannot keep track of what batches are scanned and what batches are not.   A more efficient order of scanning batches is required for counting batch managed items within a bin / on a pallet.

**Requested Solution**

In this business case the user requires a more efficient process of scanning the batches for the batch managed material being counted within the bin / on a physical pallet.   The user needs the ability to scan the batches in the physical order found on the pallet.     Example:  40 batches on a pallet, since all barcodes are pointing outward 10 batch barcodes displayed on each side of the pallet.  This would allow the user to start on one side scanning from the top to bottom in physical order, entering each count after scanning each batch.   If the batch is not found on the inventory document, but is a valid batch in the system, the user should receive a message batch not found on inventory document.  Add batch for material X? Yes or No.   If yes the user will enter the count and continue to scan the remaining batches.

entry.title: Re: Filter on multiple criteria
entry.content: Try putting {@Filter} on your report in the Details section and see what the output is. If it gives you an error right away, then post your current {@Filter} formula plus a screenshot of what's going on in the Formula Editor...i.e. the top left where is shows the values and the point of failure.

entry.title: Re: Start Hour of Sale at # instead of 1
entry.content:
You could create a variable something like...

=If [Hour of Sale] = "12am" Then 0
ElseIf [Hour of Sale] = "1am" Then 1
...
ElseIf [Hour of Sale = "10pm" Then 22
Else 23

and sort by that.

Or put a custom sort on your [Hour of Sale] column.

entry.title: Re: Why Is My Content Marked as Spam?
entry.content:
F*@#$)**@#$ spam 'filter' !!!

Just spent an hour composing an answer and because of the finicky formatting features I had to edit/repost a few times and ... *BAM* ... "this reply has been flagged and removed as spam".

How about updating the spam 'filter' to take into consideration the history of the person posting the message/reply/answer?

And the cherry on top ... a few minutes later I'm awarded the 'Contributor' badge (for posting spam).

... crossing fingers and hoping this comment isn't flagged as spam ...

entry.title: How to the find the usage of a Fiori app from the backend?
entry.content: How to find the usage of a Fiori app from the backend? The metric interested is how many users are accessing the app on a daily basis for a selected period of time. Any suggestions will be highly appreciated.

entry.title: Where can I find learning on the Termination Workbench
entry.content: Hi, I am keen to learn how the Termination Workbench sits together. How is it set up how does it know what to look for when commencing the pay component of the cycle.  Cheers Katja

entry.title: SAP Fiori Elements - Save Variant/Layout not working (and want to remove unnecessary column)
entry.content:
I have created an SAP Fiori Elements app. At first the list report would not even let me resize the columns (and they were very badly spaced out) but eventually I discovered that it would let me resize columns if I change the table to "Grid Table".

I am having two issues on the list report page:

1. When I resize the columns it allows me to save the layout but when I refresh, the layout I saved disappears.

2. There is an empty column on the left of the table that the user does not want as it takes up much needed space.

Any advice on these issues would be really appreciated.

The empty column on the left needs to be removed:

This is what I do to save the layout:

The new layout is saved:

But when I click on the drop down arrow:

And when I refresh, it is gone:

entry.title: Re: Take Photo in Maintenance Apps on Microsoft Surface G...
entry.content:
Hi Enda

Thank you for responding. I find this really interesting that the Microsoft devices are not supported when SAP and Microsoft are in partnership and working so closely together - https://www.sap.com/partners/find/microsoft.html

The issue with the Apple and Android devices is they are a single user sign on, so they do not support SSO for multiple users which is the method for logging into S4HC.. 

Rather disappointing when you want to utilise Mobility and are restricted to technology that doesnt align to business usage.

Thanks

Higgo

entry.title: Contar lineas de registros en documento de marketing antes de guardar
entry.content:
Saludos, alguien sabe como retornar la cantidad de registros de un documento de marketing antes de guardar el documento para someterno a un modelo de aprobación?

 

Agradecido de antemano

entry.title: Re: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content: Hello Esther I want to enter transaction data to test PO after I finished the configuration for it

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano 

As 40+ working in quality, I'm in the category .

As a professional aged 40+ with experience in quality management, I fall into the category of People looking to switch their careers mid-life.

After numerous years in the field of quality management, I have developed a strong passion for IT solutions, process automation, and enhancing the efficiency of workplace operations for my colleagues. As a result, I am actively seeking new opportunities in these areas.

I have recently completed training in Implementing SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and I am currently pursuing training in Signavio.

I would sincerely appreciate the opportunity to participate in your program and contribute my skills and expertise.

entry.title: Re: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content: On customizing system because I modify the company address and logo in standard PO layout and I want to enter transaction data to show the PO layout after modified the po header and footer

entry.title: Re: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content: Is it applicable on customizing system or should enter transaction data on test system only

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi @David_Chaviano,

My name is John and I'm currently working as Data Processor here in the Philippines.

I identify myself as: 

  • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

Most of the companies here in the Philippines are using SAP technologies that's why I decided to participate in this initiative to learn more about SAP technologies such as SAP HANA Cloud and ABAP Programming.

I hope my application will be consider for a free certification attempt. This will be a great help for me as I'm looking forward to make a career shift into SAP.

 

Thanks,

John

entry.title: Re: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content:
You can definitely create transactions like Purchase Orders in the DEV system as you describe to for example test the output and other system behaviour. For a test strategy (ie. what to test when and in which system) I recommend that you check the task "Create Test Strategy for SAP S/4HANA Cloud" in the Activate Roadmap Viewer.

Hope this helps.

Esther

entry.title: Re: Enter data on customizing system
entry.content: Not dev system my question was on customizing system also the modification in layouts like adding logo is key user extensibility please could you clear your answer regarding customizing system and key user extensibility thanks in advance

entry.title: SAP 分析云 2024.06 版新功能抢先看
entry.content:
SAP 分析云是一款先进的商务分析云解决方案，集商业智能 (BI)、增强分析、预测分析和企业规划功能于一体，消除单点解决方案和据孤岛挑战，能提供您需要的全面云分析功能。

本文介绍了 SAP 分析云 2024.06 版本的新功能。这些新功能已经在 SAP 分析云 FastTrack 客户的系统上线。对于 SAP 分析云季度发布周期 (QRC) 客户，此版本及其功能将作为 QRC 2024 年第2季度版本的一部分提供。这里可以查看 QRC 发布时间表。

 

系统和技术要求

尽管不是必需的，我们推荐您升级到最新的 SAP 分析云代理版本 1.0.399，利用所有数据采集类型。

除以下情况外，您的代理需要1.0.75或以上版本：

  • SAP ERP/SQL 数据库版本1.0.99
  • SAP Universe (UNX)版本1.0.365（ SAP分析云代理需要额外的设置步骤，有关详细信息，请参阅 SAP 说明3262098）
  • SAP Business Warehouse (BW)版本1.0.353
  • SAP HANA View版本1.0.235
  • File Server版本1.0.248

更多详细信息，请参阅系统要求和技术先决条件。

有关将 SAP BW 与 SAP 分析云集成的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2541557 以了解更多详细信息。

有关通过 SAP BusinessObjects Live Data Connect 与 SAP 分析云来实时访问 Universe 时的受支持功能和所需更新，请参阅 SAP Note 2771921 以了解更多详细信息。

请从“Service Marketplace”下载最新版本的“简易部署工具箱”。

  • 为避免下载旧版本并可能让用户面对 Cloud Connector 与 SAPJVM 或 Apache Tomcat 的绑定不当带来的漏洞，只有三个最新版本可供下载。

关于云代理的版本变更管理细节，请参考 SAP Note 3264839。
 

更新亮点

  • 数据发掘
    • 数据分析器中支持工作区 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 导出为 PDF 时设置适合页面宽度 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 数据建模
    • 提供“单位”属性类型 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 启用分析引擎的优化方案编写器
  • 企业计划
    • 数据操作 - 新增了日历用法的显示
    • 计划触发器－更新了格式设置选项  |（SAP路线图浏览器）
  • 故事设计
    • 在优化故事体验中替换模型 |（SAP路线图浏览器）
    • 从垂直筛选器面板中访问故事筛选器和页面筛选器
    • 支持基于SAP BW 二级结构的瀑布图
    • 向统计图的标题和页脚中添加超链接

 

数据发掘

数据分析器中支持工作区

现在使用数据分析器时，可以从工作区打开模型，也可以将洞察保存到工作区并从工作区重新打开。如果一个故事使用的模型保存到了工作区，用户也可以从它的统计图或表中打开相应的数据分析器了。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

导出为 PDF 时设置适合页面宽度

数据分析器中将数据导出为 PDF 文件时，我们增加了一个“适合页面宽度”选项。用户可以将表的大小调整为 PDF 导出的实际页面宽度。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

数据建模

提供“单位”属性类型

我们新增了一个属性类型：“单位”，可用于通用类型和组织类型的维。该属性的最大长度为127个字符，可以在“度量”部分进行设置，以显示数据的计量单位。

就像货币一样，单位属性可以添加到维。在度量处确定好单位属性后，MDS 可以确保不会在不同单位之间进行聚合操作（防止结果错误）。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

启用分析引擎的优化方案编写器

SAP 分析云2024.06以后的版本中的所有模型，都将默认使用新的查询处理引擎——“分析引擎的优化场景编写器”。这是将全球数据中心迁移至SAP HANA Cloud Platform 的一部分。此引擎将在系统更新期间自动推出。如果有紧急情况需要，只要租户尚未迁移至 SAP HANA Cloud Platform，引擎就可以恢复到旧引擎。

有关详细信息，请参阅分析引擎的优化方案编写器。

 

企业计划

数据操作 - 新增了日历用法的显示

在“数据操作设置”中，用户可以查看数据操作在其他操作或应用（例如故事、多步操作或分析应用中）的使用位置。此版本中，“使用位置”部分新包含了处于未完成状态的日历任务。此外，只有单个任务和任务系列支持此操作，任务序列的单一任务不支持。

 

计划触发器－更新了格式设置选项

现在可以在“主题首选项”对话框中修改计划触发器的默认样式。此外，计划触发器现在支持矢量格式（如 SVG）的使用。在每个计划触发器的样式设置面板中，用户可以将样式设置恢复为默认首选项，也可以将触发器按钮或字体样式分别重置为默认值。

这样使用户可以更集中地管理默认样式，包含管理计划触发器的外观。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

 

故事设计

在优化故事体验中替换模型

此版本支持用户在优化故事体验中统一替换模型。这个功能允许基于单个模型的替换，且要求替换模型必须和原始模型具有相同的数据源类型、相同数量和类型的结构维。原始模型和替换模型不需要共享相同的连接，也不需要具有相同数量的对象（账户、度量、维或属性）。但是，针对实时模型，替换模型背后的源系统的版本必须与原始模型的源系统版本相同或比它更高。（SAP路线图浏览器）

 

有些数据模型只能用作原始模型，不能用作替换模型。以下是一些原始模型和对应允许的替换模型的示例：

  • SAP Datasphere 中的分析数据集可以替换为 SAP Datasphere 中的分析模型
  • 经典账户模型可以替换为“含账户维的新模型类型”
  • 公用数据集可以替换为不含账户维的新模型类型

阅读由 Tunir Kapil 撰写的博文，了解更多信息。

 

从垂直筛选器面板中访问故事筛选器和页面筛选器

用户现在可以在垂直筛选器栏中查看故事和页面过滤器，并与之交互。在当前页面上的每个输入控件中，垂直过滤器面板上新增的“应用于此页面”部分将显示页面过滤器。用户导航到其他页面时，面板将相应更新。

请注意，这仅在垂直过滤器面板中可用。

 

支持基于 SAP BW 二级结构的瀑布图

我们现在支持基于 SAP BW 模型二级结构绘制瀑布图。查看数据必须满足以下条件：

  • 如果不存在分层度量的情况，对二级结构使用单个度量和单值筛选器后，图中只会显示单一条形。
  • 在二级结构使用多个度量和单值筛选器，将导致每个度量都是一个条形，且显示的数据基于二级结构筛选器。
  • 使用单个度量和多个二级结构成员将导致次级结构的每个成员都递增或减少，其中最后一个节点显示总计。

此功能的限制：

  • 无法更改辅助结构成员的顺序。
  • 如果至少有一个层次结构节点，展开/折叠功能将无法使用。

 

向统计图的标题和页脚中添加超链接

对于已有的从经典体验转换而来的故事，我们保留了其统计图标题和页脚中的超链接。

我们新增了在统计图标题和页脚中定义多个超链接的选项（与文本微件相同）。

现在还可以通过页面和故事超链接传递外部过滤器的信息。但是，统计图标题和页脚的设置中，“仅应用选定维”选项是隐藏的。

请注意，为了支持超链接功能，动态的图标标题会转换为静态标题。

附加资源：

  • 如何启用优化体验
  • 优化体验限制

 


本文仅提供 SAP 分析云的最新功能和增强功能的高级概述。您可以在针对FastTrack客户的应用内帮助指南中找到有关这些功能的更多详细信息，如果您想了解更多关于FastTrack和季度发布周期发布的信息，请参阅这篇SAP知识库文章。

entry.title: Re: Why missing milestone button
entry.content: This is close after configuration

entry.title: Re: Quote 2.0 : Displaying a message to the User in a spe...
entry.content:
Hello,

Please refer to the screenshot as a sample for your requirements.

entry.title: Re: Schedule Line Category determine by header block
entry.content: Closed

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA alternative BOM in CU50
entry.content:
Hi,

As I notice that when we have the alternative BOM for the KMAT, the CU50 can't display BOM, meaning BOM doesn't be exposed even we have the production version.

So do you have any comment here? If KMAT have alternative BOM, how to select in CU50?

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: The requests received by the Report Processing Server...
entry.content: i am using both latest versions of Sap Designer & crystal reports, i did get a reply for SAP which is below stated "SAP Crystal Reports 2020 reports are not supported in REST SDK as of now (e.g., 4.3 SP04)" they then asked "Can you please confirm if you can use Open document for the same workflow?" so ive made some new code and i can form a URL and generate a report via the opendoc link but i cant seem to download the PDF directly regardless of the output option in the URL

entry.title: HANA 2.0 SPS 07 long running threads
entry.content:
We have recently upgrade from HANA 2.0 SPS 05 to SPS 07 (rev 76) and have noticed that threads for the PreprocessorPool and WebDispatcher-Main-Thread run continually from startup. These threads do not appear in SP5 version and trying to work out if this is standard in the latest release.

I have also looked at my Cockpit Server, which is running on rev 73 and it has the same thing occurring.

Thanks

David

entry.title: How to mass add technical object description in a language other than English
entry.content:
When login system in a language other than English, the description missing, how to mass add technical object description in a language other than English?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to mass add technical object description in a lan...
entry.content:
Hi 

Batch request for equipment and functional location could mass add or change technical object description in a language other than English. Please note during using Postman, it is necessary to add "sap-language" in "Headres", you could select the language what you need.

For batch request please see below link

Equipment :Batch Request

Functional location : Batch Request

best regards

icey

entry.title: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code
entry.content: How to dynamically pass parameters to SimbaDSN in code ,For example, passing "key file path" as a dynamic parameter?
